author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Twenty Years in the UK - Interview
content:
Interview with Nagabodhi
20th Year in the U.K.
Contents



1 Bhante's experience of Buddhism in the West on h is return from India
4 A New Buddhist Movement
5 Bhante's eventual disillusionment with the New I ndia after independence
Other possible reasons for leaving India
7 Bhante, the reluctant revolutionary
8 Bhante's liking of Holman Hunt's pre-Raphaelite painting 'The Scapegoat'
9 Did the FWBO recruit mainly among hippies in the sixties?
12 Has the FWBO gone the way that Bhante hoped?
14 The importance of clarity
16 Bhante's priorities for the future
18 Quantum leaps in the history of the FWBO/WBO
